{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301332526F41F1B52F28B53ACFF"}"},"total":489},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7536784237334545177","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好看，世界背景设定很新颖很西幻，一点都不套路，活生生的主角团活生生的世界居民，有缺点的成长系的主角才是真正的人。看一些书评避雷这个避雷那个，厌蠢症啥的，无语死了，还有嫌弃小白马低级动物，真的是不喜欢就划过，这个是设定，这个是伙伴，哪有那么多一辈子时时刻刻都谨小慎微的人，这样多没意思啊，犯错怎么了，少年就是会犯错
作者加油，不要受一些个别评论影响✧٩(ˊωˋ*)و✧
写的好看的，超吸引人，唯一缺点就是更新太少了[哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754799788,"group_id":"7510410847596842046","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxV/3yQfOE+RXSKTmwq83j4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"93164412865","user_name":"爱吃蒸粘糕法的刘淑芬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93164412865","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7510410847596842046","book_info":{"abstract":"【西幻+魔法+魔法学校+微群像+异世+无CP】
海莉，一个现代即将毕业的大学生，一朝穿越，来到异世。
于是她拥有了：
1.开局三分钟的奴隶身份体验
2.名为徒弟实为奴仆的打工人身份体验
3.被压榨劳动力的社会牛马身份体验
4.学到头秃的魔法学校生身份体验
......
见识了奇特多样的魔法生命：地精，矮人，恶魔，亡灵，海妖，女巫......
游遍了奇谲诡丽的异界风貌：海渊，荒原，精灵之森，巨龙国度......
海莉最后回到培养自己的魔法学校，成为第一任平民出身的斯佩利安魔法学校校长。
上一任校长说：命运选中了你，你注定伟大。
海莉仰头望天：您可能不知道，我原本只是一条躺平得不能再平的咸鱼。
上一任校长惊讶：哦！那你怎么一路从全校第一卷成了大法师？
海莉叹息：说来话长。一切都要从为了生存说起......
一句话简介：一个为了避免不被抓去研究的现代灵魂努力学习，艰苦奋斗，卷成异界力量至高者的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5bf6e1e2fdad81f6eaa695944641ac13~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"霓衣风马","author_id":"","book_id":"7510410847596842046","book_name":"异界穿越：从奴隶到魔法学校校长","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4229人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7510410851430449726","read_count":"4229","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"365716"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"175","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,异世穿越,穿越,魂穿,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o5bf6e1e2fdad81f6eaa695944641ac13~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384805&x-signature=b%2FDgsInml5nakDAfwi0bL6GCGus%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3189006118425991","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"70"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301332526F41F1B52F28B53ACFF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5752,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2741},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7576262428464759577","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"巨好看的一篇魔法学院校园群像文，看的出来作者有着相当丰富的魔法知识，前面就是很温馨的校园文，就像学校老师一样将魔法讲的特别详细，到了后面几十章关于祭祀的篇章真的巨好看!无论是战斗还是阴谋都非常好看，希望作者能够多写这种刺激风格和温馨风格穿插。而且很想知道学校教授以及校长的故事外传!不要总是看着女主学习，也很想知道其他人的故事和背景[飞吻][飞吻]快快更新，等不及想看后面几章了[哭][哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763988162,"group_id":"7510410847596842046","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6eDb+PVQjUusM3PUDeOViXwnGZ5kW1mcetsCF/gwbV+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3894923152860876","user_name":"咸鱼躺躺真香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3894923152860876","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7510410847596842046","book_info":{"abstract":"【西幻+魔法+魔法学校+微群像+异世+无CP】

很好看的西幻学院文，文笔好不流水线，魔法世界写的超有意思！感觉作者真的学过魔法一样。不是爽文，学校很美好 中世纪的压抑环境也很真实，喜欢看女主和伙伴们打打闹闹的日常，也喜欢看世界观随着女主的冒险一点点展开，找到了第一次看哈利波特的感觉，唯一的缺点是追平了不够看[快哭了]","text_exts":[{"e":93,"s":90,"text":"中世纪","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%AD%E4%B8%96%E7%BA%AA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742008058B53ACFF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227578314153414984473%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227510410847596842046%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%AD%E4%B8%96%E7%BA%AA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":151,"s":147,"text":"哈利波特","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%93%88%E5%88%A9%E6%B3%A2%E7%89%B9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742008058B53ACFF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227578314153414984473%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227510410847596842046%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%93%88%E5%88%A9%E6%B3%A2%E7%89%B9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764466743,"group_id":"7510410847596842046","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxgEGiGvz3jl+FPpzSXJSx0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1563927517847","user_name":"番茄烧洋芋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1563927517847","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expa
